messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi, I just made an account—mei_patel_7272—and placed an order, but I have two issues. First, I think the 1000-piece intermediate jigsaw I ordered might be too difficult for my young child. Is it possible to switch it to the easiest puzzle with the fewest pieces? Also, I’m worried I might have entered my address wrong. Can we check and maybe fix the address on my order and my account?
